name: Microwave Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 7 oz elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
1 10.75 oz can cream of onion soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the microwave "defrost" setting, thaw broccoli in its package until it feels warm, about 6-9 minutes; drain well. In a 3-quart casserole dish, combine the remaining ingredients, reserving half the can of fried onions.
2. Microwave the casserole for 8 minutes. Stir from the outside to the center of the casserole to shorten cooking time and equalize heat. Remove from microwave.
3. Sprinkle the top with the remaining fried onions. Toppings are always added at the end of cooking so they will not be disturbed by stirring and will stay crisp. Microwave for an additional 3-6 minutes, until the center of the casserole is hot.
